name: Smallpox Deity
title: Plague Incarnate
origin: Manifested from collective fear of disease during historic epidemics

visualTheme.silhouette: Rotund, draped in funeral shrouds, coffin floating behind
visualTheme.colorLanguage: Decayed purples, infection greens, funeral blacks

passiveAura.name: Miasma Field
passiveAura.effect: Healing reduced by 50% within domain radius

buffs.name: Burial Stacks
buffs.description: Each hit applies a burial stack. At 5 stacks, player is briefly buried.

debuffs.name: Decay
debuffs.description: Player max HP gradually decreases while in domain.

phases.behavior: Uses core moveset, applies burial stacks

domainExpansion.name: Coffin Domain: Funeral Procession
domainExpansion.description: Endless coffins surround the arena. Player must dodge while finding opening.
effects: Limited movement due to coffin obstacles

weaknesses: Black Flash chains stagger rebirth cycle
strategies: Clear burial stacks by moving quickly
Chain Black Flash hits during rebirth window

requiredKillCondition.description: Chain 3 Black Flash hits during rebirth window to permanently kill
requiredKillCondition.failState: If failed, Smallpox Deity heals to 50% and restarts phase 3

artBrief.intro: Rises from ground as miasma parts, coffin floats from behind
artBrief.telegraphs: Spore clouds gather before large attacks
artBrief.domainTransition: Arena darkens, countless coffins rise from ground
artBrief.death: Body crumbles into spores, coffin shatters

name: The Hunger Census
title: Debt Collector
origin: Born from collective fear of famine, debt, and counting calories

visualTheme.silhouette: Tall, gaunt figure with counting ledger floating, skeletal hands
visualTheme.colorLanguage: Dried blood reds, parchment yellows, void blacks
visualTheme.vfxLanguage: Counting numerals, debt chains, stomach rumbling shockwaves

passiveAura.name: Hunger Field
passiveAura.effect: Player healing instead deals damage equal to heal amount

buffs.name: Debt Stacks
buffs.description: Each player attack adds debt. At 10 debt, Hunger Census heals.

debuffs.name: Starving
debuffs.description: Player CE costs doubled while debuff active.

phases.behavior: Counts player attacks, builds debt stacks
Uses reversal at 30% HP, converts healing to damage

domainExpansion.name: Domain: Empty Pantry
domainExpansion.description: Player CE drains constantly. Healing kills player.

strategies: Avoid using healing items/skills during fight

requiredKillCondition.description: Land 3 chained weakpoint interrupts during single burnout cycle
requiredKillCondition.failState: If failed, Hunger Census uses reversal and heals to 70%

artBrief.intro: Manifests from shadows with counting numerals swirling
artBrief.domainTransition: World turns grayscale, counting numbers fill vision
artBrief.death: Body dissolves into counting numerals, ledger burns

name: Bell of the Last Rite
title: Funeral Judge
origin: Cursed object that gained sentience from centuries of funeral rites

visualTheme.silhouette: Massive bell with humanoid form emerging from top
visualTheme.colorLanguage: Brass golds, funeral whites, judgment crimsons
visualTheme.vfxLanguage: Sound waves, resonance ripples, ritual circles

passiveAura.name: Judgment Toll
passiveAura.effect: Each bell toll increases player damage taken by 5% (stacks to 50%)

buffs.name: Resonance
buffs.description: Damage increases with each successful bell toll.

debuffs.name: Deafening
debuffs.description: Player sound cues and telegraphs become harder to read.

phases.behavior: Regular bell strikes, builds resonance stacks
Summons resonance pillars, domain distorts cooldown timing
3 resonance pillars must be destroyed before damage phase
Domain active. RCT if pillars not destroyed fast enough.

domainExpansion.name: Domain: Final Procession
domainExpansion.description: 3 resonance pillars must be destroyed, then domain break, then burst phase
effects: Massive toll damage if pillars not destroyed
RCT heals boss if player fails pillar mechanic

weaknesses: Black Flash during pillar destruction phase
strategies: Save burst skills for post-domain burst phase
Track toll stacks and play defensively at high stacks

requiredKillCondition.description: 1) Destroy 3 resonance pillars, 2) Break domain, 3) Burst damage phase
requiredKillCondition.failState: If pillars not destroyed in time, Bell uses RCT and restarts phase 3

identityPassive.effect: Each hit adds Judgment stack. At 5, next attack deals 200% damage.

artBrief.intro: Bell materializes from resonance, humanoid form slowly emerges
artBrief.idle: Gentle ringing sounds, humanoid figure prays within bell
artBrief.telegraphs: Sound waves visible before bell strikes
artBrief.domainTransition: Arena transforms into cathedral, pillars rise from ground
artBrief.death: Bell cracks and shatters, humanoid form dissolves into light
